VA18B_RESTRAINT_PC (VA18B) Physical Restraints Care Planning Decision CHAR 1 RAP summary: physical restraints - proceed with care. 0 = Not Triggered, 1 = Triggered, "-" = Determination precluded by missing data.
586 VB2 VB2_RAP_DT (VB2) RAP Date DATE 8 RAP summary: RAP assessment signature date.
587 VB4 VB4_CARE_PLAN_DT (VB4) Care Planning Decision Date DATE 8 RAP summary: care plan signature date.
588 W1 W1_NATL_PRVDR_ID (W1) National Provider ID CHAR 10 National Provider ID.
589 W2A
